title: Dropdown Menu UI Component
content:
This file exports a set of React components that provide a customizable dropdown menu interface, built upon `@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu`. These components are designed for easy integration into the DocMed UI system.

## Key Exports

- **`DropdownMenu`**: The root component for the dropdown menu.
- **`DropdownMenuTrigger`**: The element that triggers the dropdown to open.
- **`DropdownMenuPortal`**: Renders children into a portal. Use when you need to contain the dropdown menu to the DOM, typically to prevent overflow issues.
- **`DropdownMenuGroup`**: Groups `DropdownMenuItem` components.
- **`DropdownMenuSub`**: Used for nested dropdown menus.
- **`DropdownMenuSubTrigger`**: The trigger for a nested dropdown menu.
- **`DropdownMenuSubContent`**: The content container for a nested dropdown menu.
- **`DropdownMenuContent`**: The main container for dropdown menu items. Accepts `sideOffset` to control its position relative to the trigger.
- **`DropdownMenuItem`**: Represents an individual selectable item within the dropdown. Can accept an `inset` prop for indentation.
- **`DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`**: A checkbox item within the dropdown. Displays a checkmark when selected.
- **`DropdownMenuRadioItem`**: A radio button item within the dropdown. Displays a circle when selected, ensuring only one item in a group can be selected.
- **`DropdownMenuLabel`**: A label for a group of dropdown items. Can accept an `inset` prop for indentation.
- **`DropdownMenuSeparator`**: A visual separator between dropdown items.
- **`DropdownMenuShortcut`**: Displays a keyboard shortcut associated with a dropdown item.
- **`DropdownMenuRadioGroup`**: A group for `DropdownMenuRadioItem` components, ensuring only one can be selected.

## Usage Example

```jsx
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";

function MyDropdown() {
  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Open Menu</Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56">
        <DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Profile
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Billing
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset disabled>
          Settings
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Log out
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  );
}

export default MyDropdown;
```

Each component accepts standard HTML attributes and a `className` prop for custom styling. The `cn` utility function is used for merging class names.

Nested dropdowns can be created using `DropdownMenuSub`, `DropdownMenuSubTrigger`, and `DropdownMenuSubContent`.
